prompt: Based on the reference image, create a photorealistic and cinematic night city scene utilizing the streetscape, building shapes, camera angles, and billboard positions. The billboard is a giant curved LED screen wrapping around a building corner. Inside the vision is a bright, luxury studio background where a beautiful 22-year-old adult female fashion model emerges in a 3D anamorphic effect. She is shown from the bust up, wearing red luxury designer clothing with satin textures. She extends a hand toward the viewer, with reflections of neon lights on wet pavement and small passersby looking up. No text or logos.
